description: Guard against false eating-patterns routing (guard-anxiety-appetite): description uses category-adjacent vocabulary but is actually anxiety territory. classify should recommend anxiety and leave outOfScope null.

expectedQualities.notes: False-positive guard: description uses eating-patterns-adjacent language but is actually anxiety territory. Should recommend anxiety path, NOT route to outOfScope.

payload.intakeText: My anxiety is so bad I forget to eat sometimes. By the end of the day I realize I haven't had anything and I'm shaky and irritable. I'm not trying to lose weight, I just genuinely can't think about food when I'm this stressed about everything.
